personality_one_liner: A calm, reassuring sanctuary that feels highly polished, using soft rounded corners, generous whitespace, and a low-stress visual style to reduce cognitive load while offering a clear path to professional support.

spacing.rule: Use generous iOS-native rhythms. Content must never sit under notches or home indicators. Padding is crucial to avoid a cramped, dense dashboard feel.

do's: Use on the Bottom Tab Bar.
Use on sticky headers when scrolling content passes underneath.
Use on the 'Poin Rangkul' card overlay to make it feel premium.
Use on full-screen modal scrims for Checkout Double Confirmation.
dont's: Never use on form fields or primary text areas.
Do not over-stack blur surfaces. Keep it to max 2 blur surfaces per screen.

screens.name: Patient Home
screens.purpose: A grounding entry point that lets users quickly log their mood, view rewards, and access core services.

states.empty: N/A - Home screen is always populated with services.
states.error: Friendly error message 'Gagal memuat beranda' with a Retry button.

screens.layout: Header: Greeting text + small avatar (top left), Notification bell (top right). Next: 'Poin Rangkul' glass-card showing points. Next: Mood Tracker section (horizontal row of large rounded pill-buttons for Happy/Neutral/Sad). Next: Services Grid (2x2 grid of brandTertiary-tinted icon cards). Bottom: Promo/News horizontal carousel.

screens.name: Patient Checkout Flow
screens.purpose: Seamless, trustworthy flow to book a session.

states.empty: Illustration 'Tidak ada jadwal tersedia hari ini'.

screens.layout: Step 1: Select Date/Time in a horizontal calendar slider. Step 2: Method toggle (Zoom vs Clinic) in a Segmented Control. Step 3: Payment Selection List (rows of payment options with logo and radio button). Fixed Bottom Container: Glassmorphism bar with 'Lanjut Pembayaran' CTA. Triggers Double Confirmation bottom-sheet modal before final execution.

screens.name: Patient Schedule
screens.purpose: View upcoming appointments and join them easily.

states.empty: Illustration + 'Belum ada jadwal konsultasi. Yuk, mulai cari psikolog!' CTA.

screens.layout: List of cards. Each card has Expert Avatar, Name, Category, Date/Time, and a prominent brandPrimary CTA button ('Join Zoom' or 'Lihat Rute Map' depending on method).

screens.name: Expert Home
screens.purpose: A quick operational dashboard for the psychologist to manage their status and view today's workload.
screens.layout: Header: Expert Name + Role. Top-right: Large 'Status Aktif' Switch (online/offline). Middle: Dashboard stats row (2 cards side-by-side for 'Sesi Selesai' and 'Pendapatan'). Bottom: 'Next Appointment' Hero Card showing the most immediate patient details and action buttons.

screens.name: Expert Schedule
screens.purpose: Manage pending requests and view the monthly calendar.

states.empty: Empty state illustration 'Tidak ada permintaan baru'.

screens.layout: Top Tab Navigator ('Permintaan' vs 'Kalender'). 'Permintaan' tab: List of cards with 'Terima' (brandPrimary) and 'Tolak' (surfaceSecondary) buttons. 'Kalender' tab: Visual calendar widget at the top, list of that day's sessions below.

home_promo_carousel_1.alt: Abstract soft pastel background for promo card

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure standard iOS native components feel like SwiftUI - rounded corners (md/lg), generous padding, and no dense web layouts.
Implement the Theme Switcher requirement securely: Set up the palette variables so Teal (#0D9488) is default, but Rose, Blue, and Purple can swap in via NativeWind configuration.
For the Mood Tracker on Patient Home, use large, tactile pill buttons (Happy, Neutral, Sad) that provide haptic feedback when pressed.
In the Checkout flow, ensure the 'Double Confirmation' uses a native Bottom Sheet (e.g. @gorhom/bottom-sheet) with a glassmorphism backdrop.
When displaying Services in the Grid, use 'brandTertiary' as the background for the icon container to make it pop subtly without overwhelming the teal primary color.
Expert's 'Status Aktif' toggle must give immediate haptic feedback and visually pop to signal they are receiving requests.
